sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES Ghostbusters

special_mechanics.name: Falling Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Touching ghosts inside the Zuul Building causes the player character to fall. Uses a specific falling sprite distinct from crossing streams collision.

special_mechanics.name: Stream Crossing
special_mechanics.description: When two Ghostbusters cross streams while catching ghosts, they appear to explode then immediately return to normal and walk away unharmed. Likely unintended behavior.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is primarily known for bad mechanics and difficult staircase sequence that prevents most players from reaching final boss. Movement and jump physics are not detailed in documentation.
